changes: Rewritten MatchDetail to match prints 07+08. Replaced old Header with ScreenHeader+IconButton(Share2). Result hero card: full-width white card rounded-[16px] shadow-md with uppercase date label, trophy-decorated team names, 30px score. Set-a-set section: new SetRow component with SET label, bold winner name in win-700, font-num 18px scores, x separator. Balance card: er-balance style with Scale icon, bal-500/700 colors, team force bars (green-500 and ink-700), hint text. Elencos completos: TeamHeader with dot+name+badge(Vitoria/Derrota), RosterChips with Avatar+firstName+LEV tag in yellow-400 pill. Actions section with Editar resultado, Corrigir elenco, Compartilhar, Ver avaliacoes, Excluir partida. Added EvaluationsOverlay (screen 08) toggled by showEvals state: ScreenHeader back, match context card with volleyball icon in green-50, StatBadge row (presentes/avaliados/ajustes), player list with engagement badge or Avaliar button, sticky bottom CTA. Uses useSessionEvaluations hook. All hooks/navigation/mutations preserved. No globals.css or shared component edits.
